mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_diary_analysis_state ( diary_id, user_id, dirty, analysis_status, content_hash, content_updated_at, last_marked_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{diaryId}, #{userId}, 1, 'DIRTY', #{contentHash}, NOW(), NOW(), NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), dirty = 1, analysis_status = 'DIRTY', content_hash = VALUES(content_hash), content_updated_at = NOW(), last_marked_at = NOW(), last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET dirty = 0, analysis_status = 'STALE', last_marked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.diary_id, s.user_id, d.title, d.content_md, d.diary_date, d.mood_id, d.updated_at AS diary_updated_at, s.content_hash, s.content_updated_at FROM tb_diary_analysis_state s INNER JOIN tb_diary d ON d.diary_id = s.diary_id AND d.user_id = s.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.dirty = 1 AND s.analysis_status IN ('DIRTY', 'FAILED') AND s.content_updated_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) ORDER BY s.content_updated_at ASC, s.diary_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET dirty = 0, analysis_status = 'ANALYZING', updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND dirty = 1 AND analysis_status IN ('DIRTY', 'FAILED') AND content_hash = #{contentHash} AND content_updated_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)

UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET dirty = 1, analysis_status = 'DIRTY', content_hash = #{contentHash}, content_updated_at = NOW(), last_marked_at = NOW(), last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND analysis_status = 'ANALYZING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_diary_analysis ( diary_id, user_id, analysis_version, status, is_active, content_hash, diary_updated_at_snapshot, binding_id, system_template_id, user_template_id, runtime_profile_id, started_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{diaryId}, #{userId}, #{analysisVersion}, 'ANALYZING', 0, #{contentHash}, #{diaryUpdatedAtSnapshot}, #{bindingId}, #{systemTemplateId}, #{userTemplateId}, #{runtimeProfileId}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_diary_analysis SET status = 'SUCCESS', is_active = 1, raw_response_json = #{rawResponseJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, summary_text = #{summaryText}, error_code = NULL, error_message = NULL, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE analysis_id = #{analysisId}

UPDATE tb_diary_analysis SET status = 'FAILED', is_active = 0, raw_response_json = #{rawResponseJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE analysis_id = #{analysisId}
UPDATE tb_diary_analysis SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_active = 1 AND analysis_id != #{analysisId}
UPDATE tb_diary_event SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE tb_diary_trait_evidence SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_diary_event ( analysis_id, diary_id, user_id, event_type, event_title, event_summary, emotion, emotion_intensity, people_json, places_json, activities_json, relationship_json, causality_json, pattern_candidate_json, confidence, evidence_text, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{event.analysisId}, #{event.diaryId}, #{event.userId}, #{event.eventType}, #{event.eventTitle}, #{event.eventSummary}, #{event.emotion}, #{event.emotionIntensity}, #{event.peopleJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.placesJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.activitiesJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.relationshipJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.causalityJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.patternCandidateJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{event.confidence}, #{event.evidenceText}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO tb_diary_trait_evidence ( analysis_id, diary_id, user_id, trait_key, signal_score, confidence, evidence_text, reason_json, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{evidence.analysisId}, #{evidence.diaryId}, #{evidence.userId}, #{evidence.traitKey}, #{evidence.signalScore}, #{evidence.confidence}, #{evidence.evidenceText}, #{evidence.reasonJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET dirty = 0, analysis_status = 'SUCCESS', last_analyzed_at = NOW(), active_analysis_id = #{analysisId}, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
UPDATE tb_diary_analysis_state SET dirty = 1, analysis_status = 'FAILED', last_error_code = #{errorCode}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId}
mapper.select: SELECT trait_key, trait_category, trait_name, trait_description, score_direction, sort_seq FROM tb_mst_trait_definition WHERE is_active = 1 AND trait_scope = 'CORE' AND approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND auto_apply_enabled = 1 ORDER BY trait_category, sort_seq, trait_key
SELECT code_id FROM tb_common_code WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_seq, code_id
